description: Clogs meet moccasins in these shoes from catwalk for women. Designed for formal wear, this shiny shoe adds instant quirk when you wear it with casual ensembles. With a unique style of its own, this shoe is for women who favour the androgynous mood of the moment.UpperSynthetic leather upper with floral cutouts on the front and slip on stylingReinforced overlays for the toe box, stitched onto the upper for optimal durabilityReinforced overlay for the heel cup with elasticated band attaching it to the upperPadded, perforated inner for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with textured patterning on a lightly upraised heel and forefootShoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
